summary: Iteration 24 — Admin attendance override + leave-type popup. Backend (9/9 pytest) + UI E2E both PASS. All required data-testids present, dialog opens on calendar cell click, leave types CL/SL/PL/UL render in select, UL save persists & cell shows 'UL', re-open preselects On Leave with correct type, Clear removes leave and reverts cell. No legacy 'Leave Mode' button. 0 console errors.

issues: Toast 'Failed to load salon information' surfaces on /salons after using legacy /api/salon/password-login token — unrelated to this feature but noted for E1.

action_items: Optional: UI login via /api/salon/users/login returns 401 for the test salon (legacy fallback only triggers on 404). Pre-existing — bypassed for this test by injecting token directly. Consider falling back on 401 too, or seed a salon_users record for +917503070727.
critical_code_review_comments: AttendanceCellDialog correctly routes: times+auto → PUT check-edit; manual status (no times) → PUT override; on_leave → POST leave-records (cancel-first); clear → DELETE override + cancel leave. Routing is clean.

Backend auto-compute on check-edit uses salon geo rules (max_check_in_time / min_daily_minutes in IST). Tests sent IST-offset ISO timestamps to reproduce the request scenario (10:00→19:00 = present 540m, 10:00→13:00 = half_day). Both pass.
Frontend uses browser-local time + toISOString() — admins in a different TZ than the salon could mismark attendance. Worth surfacing TZ in the dialog label.
On Leave save flow cancels prior active leave before creating new — correct. Half-day checkbox testid wired.
test_credentials: Salon admin: phone +917503070727 / password Test@1234. Login API: POST /api/salon/password-login. UI /salon/users/login returns 401 for this account — bypass by injecting access_token into localStorage keys: salon_user_auth, salon_id, access_token, token, salon_token, userRole.
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix in notes, all cleaned up post-test (override DELETE + leave-record DELETE).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use page.request to call /api/salon/password-login and inject localStorage to bypass broken /api/salon/users/login flow. Calendar lives at /salon/staff/{barber_id} → Attendance tab. attn-cell-{YYYY-MM-DD} data-testids work. June 1, 2026 was 'today' during this run.
rca of the issue: N/A — fresh feature implementation verified end-to-end.
